title: Tempting Traditional Russian Cherry Puff
description: A traditional Russian dessert featuring cherry filling and laminated puff pastry, high in protein and perfect for a nostalgic treat. This earthy and dense pastry is a classic Russian delight.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and salt.
Add cold butter to the flour mixture and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour until it resembles coarse crumbs.
In a small bowl, whisk together eggs and milk.
Add the egg mixture to the flour mixture and stir until a dough forms.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 5 minutes.
Roll out the dough to a large rectangle, about 1/4 inch thick.
Spread the cherry filling over the center of the dough, leaving a 1 inch border on either side.
Fold the dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Place the pastry on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper and brush with egg wash.
Bake for 35 minutes, or until golden brown.
